case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. KENYON EBERITESCH et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EBERITESCH, KENYON
DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EBERITESCH, KENYON $7,187.05 PRINCIPAL, $856.25 INTEREST, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,336.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT & DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EBERITESCH, KENYON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-23-2013
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT EBERITESCH, KENYON
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 17025034) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT EBERITESCH, KENYON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUL-22-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EBERITESCH, KENYON
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION / AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT OF CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
